steps.title: Find the definition of an isthmus
steps.content: Definition clue: The notes define an isthmus as “a strip of land that connects two larger pieces of land across an expanse of water.”

steps.title: Apply the definition to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C — The Isthmus of Suez and the Auckland Isthmus both connect two larger pieces of land across an expanse of water. uses that definition to say both the Isthmus of Suez and the Auckland Isthmus connect two larger pieces of land across water, highlighting their similarity.
The other choices either repeat the definition without referencing both isthmuses, mention only one isthmus, or do not emphasize the shared feature.
That is the correct answer.
